name: Bailey
description:
OC | Technogenesis | Being a leader was not something Bailey's considered before the reign of Terminus. All she wanted was to be a good cop, and a humble woman. Fate has an awful sense of humor though. As the leader of the 7th Coalition, it's her job to ensure the safety of those around her. It stresses her out to no end, forcing her to constantly have a brave face to protect this new family. But perhaps, pretending to be brave for others is courage in itself?

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War

I honestly can't wait to get around to doing her prequel version. Unlike the others, her prequel will be during the events of the first day of Technogenesis. That first day is known as Apotheosis.

UPDATE 09-15-2025: Re-uploaded the bonus image and added one more!

UPDATE 05-22-2026: Experimenting with adding some Lorebooks to this one as a test. REQUESTING FEEDBACK! Thank you!

Bonus Images:

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
creator: Anonoboi
